pages.text: The $(item)End Portal Skyseed$() — the long way round to the End. It comes together from $(o)four portal edges$(), and each edge is forged from a $(item)Portal Frame Shard$() and two $(o)structure relics$().$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Shards turn up in $(item)dungeon$() chests. The eight relics are rare chest drops from across the mod — the $(item)Mansion$(), $(item)Monument$(), both temples, the $(item)Trial Chamber$(), the $(item)Outpost$(), the $(item)Fortress$() and the $(item)Bastion$(). Re-grow a structure to re-roll its loot.
All four edges in hand — cross them to forge the seed.

Plant it and a $(o)stronghold portal chamber$() grows on a small stone island: a stone-brick room, lit and aged, built around the vanilla $(item)12-frame End portal$(). The frames start $(bold)empty$() — the chamber is the frame, not the key.

$(bold)Lighting it$()$(br)Fill all twelve frames with $(item)Eyes of Ender$() — Blaze Rods from a $(item)Nether Fortress$() island, crushed with $(item)Ender Pearls$(). The portal opens in the centre. Step through and you are in the End.$(br2)Throw a few spare seeds in your pack first — the End grows empty.

$(bold)Crafting$()$(br)The four portal edges set in a cross: $(item)Grand$() on top, $(item)Camp$() and $(item)Temple$() to the sides, $(item)Nether$() below. The centre stays open — that is where the portal will be.
